response.justification: Candidate is a skilled senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~14 years of solid software craftsmanship experience, but the role requires Principal/Director-level IC seniority with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and strategic advisory experience with cloud and AI technologies. The resume shows only recent, limited exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) at re:cinq starting April 2025, no advanced AI/ML degree, no record of building recognized AI products, and no evidence of cloud/AI strategy leadership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops)
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: Lacks recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale
No advanced degree in AI/ML and minimal depth in cloud strategy advisory
Career level reads as senior/staff IC rather than Principal/Director-level strategic leader

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth and recognized AI product track record
Seniority gap relative to Principal/Director IC expectation
Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot breadth
